responses.en: Hello! Welcome to Toolmetry support. How can I assist you today? 😊
responses.hi: Namaste! Toolmetry support mein aapka swagat hai. Main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hu? 🙏

responses.en: 🛠️ Toolmetry is your all-in-one platform for useful online tools! From text converters to calculators, image tools to generators - we make your daily tasks easier. All tools are free and easy to use!
responses.hi: 🛠️ Toolmetry aapke liye useful online tools ka ek complete platform hai! Text converters se lekar calculators, image tools se generators tak - hum aapke daily tasks aasan banate hain. Sab tools free aur easy to use hain!

responses.en: 📋 We offer: Text Tools (case converter, word counter), Calculators (scientific, BMI), Image Tools (compressor, converter), Generators (QR code, password), Developer Tools (JSON formatter, regex tester), and many more!
responses.hi: 📋 Hum offer karte hain: Text Tools (case converter, word counter), Calculators (scientific, BMI), Image Tools (compressor, converter), Generators (QR code, password), Developer Tools (JSON formatter, regex tester), aur bhi bahut kuch!

responses.en:
🔐 To reset your password:
1. Go to Login page
2. Click 'Forgot Password'
3. Enter your registered email
4. Check your inbox for reset link
5. Create new password and login!
responses.hi:
🔐 Password reset karne ke liye:
1. Login page par jayein
2. 'Forgot Password' par click karein
3. Apna registered email daalein
4. Inbox check karein reset link ke liye
5. Naya password banayein aur login karein!

responses.en:
📝 Creating account is easy:
1. Visit toolmetry.com
2. Click 'Sign Up' (top right)
3. Enter your email & create password
4. Verify your email
5. Start using tools!
responses.hi:
📝 Account banana bahut aasan hai:
1. toolmetry.com par jayein
2. 'Sign Up' par click karein (top right)
3. Apna email aur password daalein
4. Email verify karein
5. Tools use karna shuru karein!

responses.en:
🔑 Login issues? Try these:
1. Check email/password spelling
2. Clear browser cache
3. Try incognito/private mode
4. Reset password if forgotten
5. Disable browser extensions
responses.hi:
🔑 Login mein problem? Ye try karein:
1. Email/password spelling check karein
2. Browser cache clear karein
3. Incognito/private mode try karein
4. Password reset karein agar bhool gaye
5. Browser extensions disable karein

responses.en:
🎯 How to use any tool:
1. Select the tool from menu
2. Read the description/guide
3. Input your data/text
4. Click the action button
5. Get instant results!
Most tools have examples too!
responses.hi:
🎯 Koi bhi tool kaise use karein:
1. Menu se tool select karein
2. Description/guide padhein
3. Apna data/text daalein
4. Action button click karein
5. Instant results paayein!
Most tools mein examples bhi hain!

responses.en:
📱 Yes! Toolmetry works perfectly on mobile:
✅ No app needed - use browser
✅ Fully responsive design
✅ Works on Android & iOS
✅ Fast loading even on slow networks
Just visit toolmetry.com on your phone!
responses.hi:
📱 Haan! Toolmetry mobile par perfectly kaam karta hai:
✅ Koi app nahi chahiye - browser use karein
✅ Fully responsive design
✅ Android & iOS dono par
✅ Slow network par bhi fast
Bus phone par toolmetry.com visit karein!

responses.en:
⚠️ Quick fixes to try:
1. 🔄 Refresh the page (F5)
2. 🧹 Clear browser cache
3. 🌐 Check internet connection
4. 🔄 Try a different browser
5. 📋 Check if input format is correct
If still not working, tell us which tool and we'll fix it ASAP!
responses.hi:
⚠️ Quick fixes try karein:
1. 🔄 Page refresh karein (F5)
2. 🧹 Browser cache clear karein
3. 🌐 Internet connection check karein
4. 🔄 Dusra browser try karein
5. 📋 Input format sahi hai ki nahi check karein
Agar abhi bhi nahi chal raha, batayein kaunsa tool aur hum fix kar denge!

responses.en:
⏱️ Slow loading? Try:
1. Check your internet speed
2. Close unused browser tabs
3. Disable VPN temporarily
4. Try during off-peak hours
5. Use lite mode if available
responses.hi:
⏱️ Loading slow hai? Ye try karein:
1. Internet speed check karein
2. Unused browser tabs band karein
3. VPN temporarily disable karein
4. Off-peak hours mein try karein
5. Lite mode use karein agar available ho

responses.en:
💰 Great news! Toolmetry is 100% FREE:
✅ All tools - No cost
✅ No signup required for most tools
✅ No hidden charges
✅ No credit card needed
✅ Unlimited usage
We believe in making useful tools accessible to everyone!
responses.hi:
💰 Great news! Toolmetry 100% FREE hai:
✅ All tools - Koi cost nahi
✅ Most tools ke liye signup nahi chahiye
✅ Koi hidden charges nahi
✅ Credit card nahi chahiye
✅ Unlimited usage
Hum useful tools sabke liye accessible banana chahte hain!

responses.en:
👨‍💻 Developer? Currently, tools are web-based only. For API access:
• Contact us with your use case
• We're building API endpoints
• Priority access for beta testers
Email: support@yourdomain.com with 'API Request' in subject!
responses.hi:
👨‍💻 Developer? Abhi tools web-based hain. API access ke liye:
• Apna use case batakar contact karein
• Hum API endpoints bana rahe hain
• Beta testers ko priority access
Email: support@yourdomain.com subject mein 'API Request' likhein!

responses.en:
💾 Most tools offer download:
✅ Look for 'Download' button
✅ Right-click > Save image (for images)
✅ Copy & paste results
✅ Some tools auto-download
Need help with a specific tool? Let us know!
responses.hi:
💾 Most tools mein download option hai:
✅ 'Download' button dhoondhein
✅ Right-click > Save image (images ke liye)
✅ Copy & paste kar sakte hain
✅ Kuch tools auto-download karte hain
Kisi specific tool mein help chahiye? Batayein!

responses.en:
🔒 Your privacy is our priority:
✅ No data stored on our servers
✅ Processing happens in your browser
✅ No tracking or analytics
✅ No ads or third-party scripts
✅ HTTPS encrypted connection
Your data is safe with us!
responses.hi:
🔒 Aapki privacy hamari priority hai:
✅ Koi data hamare servers par store nahi hota
✅ Processing aapke browser mein hoti hai
✅ Koi tracking ya analytics nahi
✅ Koi ads ya third-party scripts nahi
✅ HTTPS encrypted connection
Aapka data humare saath safe hai!

responses.en:
📧 Reach us at:
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Discord: Join our server
• Twitter: @ToolmetryAI
We typically respond within 24 hours!
responses.hi:
📧 Humse contact karein:
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Discord: Hamara server join karein
• Twitter: @ToolmetryAI
Hum typically 24 hours mein respond karte hain!

responses.en:
🌐 Visit us at: https://toolmetry.com
Bookmark it for quick access!
responses.hi:
🌐 Hum visit karein: https://toolmetry.com
Quick access ke liye bookmark karein!

responses.en:
👨‍💼 Need human help? I'm tagging our support team!

Please wait while our team reviews your query. For urgent issues, email support@yourdomain.com
responses.hi:
👨‍💼 Insaan ki madad chahiye? Main support team ko tag kar raha hu!

Kripya wait karein jab tak hamari team aapki query review karti hai. Urgent issues ke liye email karein: support@yourdomain.com

responses.en: 😊 You're very welcome! Happy to help anytime. Need anything else? Just ask!
responses.hi: 😊 Aapka bahut bahut swagat hai! Madad karke acha laga. Kuch aur chahiye? Bas poochiye!

responses.en: 👋 Goodbye! Have an awesome day! Remember, we're always here when you need help. See you soon!
responses.hi: 👋 Alvida! Aapka din shubh ho! Yaad rakhein, jab bhi madad chahiye hum yahan hain. Phir milenge!

responses.en:
✉️ To verify your account:
1. Check your email inbox
2. Look for 'Verify Email' from Toolmetry
3. Click the verification link
4. If not found, check spam folder
5. Request new verification link if expired!
responses.hi:
✉️ Account verify karne ke liye:
1. Apna email inbox check karein
2. Toolmetry se 'Verify Email' dhoondhein
3. Verification link par click karein
4. Agar nahi mila, spam folder check karein
5. Agar link expire ho gaya, naya link request karein!

responses.en:
🗑️ To delete your account:
1. Login to your account
2. Go to Settings
3. Click 'Delete Account'
4. Confirm your password
5. Confirm deletion
⚠️ This action cannot be undone!
responses.hi:
🗑️ Account delete karne ke liye:
1. Apne account mein login karein
2. Settings par jayein
3. 'Delete Account' par click karein
4. Apna password confirm karein
5. Deletion confirm karein
⚠️ Ye action undo nahi ho sakta!

responses.en:

responses.hi:

responses.en:
💡 Feature Request?
We love to hear from users! Submit your ideas:
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Subject: 'Feature Request'
• Describe your idea
We'll review and consider it for future updates!
responses.hi:
💡 Feature Request?
Hum users se sunna pasand karte hain! Apne ideas submit karein:
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Subject: 'Feature Request'
• Apna idea describe karein
Hum review karke future updates mein consider karenge!

responses.en:
🐛 Found a bug? Report it!
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Subject: 'Bug Report'
• Include: Tool name, steps to reproduce, screenshot
We'll fix it ASAP! Thanks for helping us improve!
responses.hi:
🐛 Bug mil gaya? Report karein!
• Email: support@yourdomain.com
• Subject: 'Bug Report'
• Include: Tool ka naam, steps reproduce, screenshot
Hum fix kar denge ASAP! Improve karne ke liye thanks!

responses.en:
🔒 Security is our priority:
✅ All data processed in browser
✅ No data stored on servers
✅ HTTPS encryption everywhere
✅ No third-party tracking
✅ Regular security audits
Your data is always safe!
responses.hi:
🔒 Security hamari priority hai:
✅ Saara data browser mein process hota hai
✅ Koi data servers par store nahi hota
✅ Har jagah HTTPS encryption
✅ Koi third-party tracking nahi
✅ Regular security audits
Aapka data hamesha safe hai!

responses.en:
🆕 What's New?
Check our changelog at toolmetry.com/updates
Recent additions: New tools, UI improvements, bug fixes, performance enhancements. Subscribe to our newsletter for updates!
responses.hi:
🆕 Kya Naya Hai?
Hamara changelog check karein toolmetry.com/updates
Recent additions: Naye tools, UI improvements, bug fixes, performance enhancements. Updates ke liye newsletter subscribe karein!

responses.en:
❓ Need Help?
• Browse our Help Center
• Check tool-specific guides
• Contact support team
• Join our Discord community
• Read our documentation
We're here to help!
responses.hi:
❓ Help Chahiye?
• Hamara Help Center browse karein
• Tool-specific guides check karein
• Support team se contact karein
• Hamari Discord community join karein
• Hamari documentation padhein
Hum yahan madad ke liye hain!

responses.en:
🟢 Server Status:
• All systems operational
• Check status.toolmetry.com for real-time updates
• Follow @ToolmetryStatus on Twitter for alerts
• Scheduled maintenance announced in advance
responses.hi:
🟢 Server Status:
• Saare systems operational
• Real-time updates ke liye status.toolmetry.com check karein
• Alerts ke liye @ToolmetryStatus Twitter par follow karein
• Scheduled maintenance advance mein announce hota hai

responses.en:
⭐ Share Your Feedback!
We value your opinion:
• Rate us on Trustpilot
• Leave a review on our Discord
• Email suggestions to support@yourdomain.com
• Help us improve Toolmetry!
responses.hi:
⭐ Apna Feedback Share Karein!
Hum aapki opinion value karte hain:
• Trustpilot par rate karein
• Hamare Discord par review chodein
• Suggestions email karein support@yourdomain.com
• Toolmetry improve karne mein help karein!

fallbackResponses.en:
I'm not sure about that specific query. Let me tag our support team to help you!

Meanwhile, you can check our Help Center or email support@yourdomain.com
fallbackResponses.hi:
Is specific query ke baare mein mujhe sure nahi hai. Main support team ko tag kar raha hu aapki madad ke liye!

Tab tak aap Help Center check kar sakte hain ya email karein: support@yourdomain.com
